title: Intern Strategic Planning
jobDescription:
Job Summary:

To support the Strategy Planning Marketing team in business planning, market intelligence, reporting, management reviews and planning execution of Marketing events, while building a strong foundation in strategic thinking, business analytics, and marketing.

In this Role, Your Responsibilities Will Be:

  • Support strategic planning and annual business planning processes.
  • Assist in preparing review presentation executive decks.
  • Conduct market, competitor, and business performance analysis.
  • Coordinate with Businesses cross-functional teams to gather data and insights.
  • Support Businesses country leadership on ad hoc analysis and special projects for business growth and performance improvement.
  • Support leadership in planning execution of Marketing exercises, events, leadership visits conferences.

Who We Are:

  • At Emerson, we are a dynamic team that drives Strategic Planning support to Businesses, while delivering executive presentations and reviews. Our work spans market, competitor, and performance analysis, ensuring data-driven insights that empower decision-making. By collaborating across businesses and functions, we gather intelligence that fuels innovation and performance improvement. We partner with country leadership on special projects, marketing initiatives, and key events, playing a pivotal role in advancing business growth and strengthening Emerson s global presence.

For This Role, You Will Need :

  • Strong strategic and analytical thinking
  • Genuine interest in strategy, business performance, marketing, and growth opportunities
  • Strong understanding of Macrodynamic, markets, customers, competitors, and business drivers
  • Action-oriented individuals who take initiative and learn fast
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Collaborative team players who can work effectively across functions
  • Professional presence and confidence in engaging with stakeholders
  • High leadership potential and aspiration to grow into broader business roles
  • Flexibility to explore future opportunities across strategy planning, business analysis, marketing, and commercial leadership tracks

  • Exposure to finance, accounting, business analytics, and market insight generation will be a plus.

    Our Culture Commitment to You:

At Emerson, we prioritize a workplace where every employee is valued, respected, and empowered to grow. We foster an environment that encourages innovation, collaboration, and diverse perspectives because we know that great ideas come from great teams. Our commitment to ongoing career development and growing an inclusive culture ensures you have the support to thrive. Whether through mentorship, training, or leadership opportunities, we invest in your success so you can make a lasting impact. We believe diverse teams, working together are key to driving growth and delivering business results.

We recognize the importance of employee wellbeing. We prioritize providing competitive benefits plans, a variety of medical insurance plans, Employee Assistance Program, employee resource groups, recognition, and much more. Our culture offers flexible time off plans, including paid parental leave (maternal and paternal), vacation and holiday leave.

jobDescription:
Business Analyst Traineeship
We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Fresher Business Analyst to join our dynamic team. As a Business Analyst, you will play a crucial role in analyzing business needs, identifying opportunities for improvement, and assisting in the development of innovative solutions to enhance our operations. This is an excellent opportunity for recent graduates looking to kickstart their careers in business analysis.
This is a Remote Position.

  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
  • Eagerness to learn and adapt to new challenges.

title: Customer Success Engineer Intern
jobDescription:
Safe is not a typical corporate environment. We are a high-intensity, mission-driven team. We value builders who want to define a category and work alongside people who are equally committed to excellence.
  • Extreme Ownership: We don t do "not my job." We hire people who see a gap and own the solution from start to finish.
  • The Elite Standard: We serve the most sophisticated companies on the planet. Our work must be bulletproof. Whether it s a line of code or a sales deck, we aim for Tier-1 quality every time.
  • Methodology Rigor: We don t wing it. From Force Management and MEDDICC in sales to data-driven sprints in engineering, we rely on proven frameworks to stay disciplined and predictable.
  • Radical Candor: We move too fast for politics or sugar-coating. We value direct, honest feedback that helps us find the right answer quickly.
  • The Series C Hustle: We have the stability of a well-funded leader but the heart of a startup.
The Perks Ownership:
We want our team to feel like owners because they are owners. We trust our people to manage their results and their time.
  • Meaningful Equity: Every "Safestar" is a shareholder. You aren t just an employee; you are a partner in our success.
  • Unlimited Leaves: We don t believe in clock-watching. We offer unlimited leave because we trust you to take the time you need to recharge while staying committed to the mission.
  • Comprehensive Benefits: We provide top-tier medical insurance and wellness benefits to ensure you and your family are well cared for.
  • Career Trajectory: We are growing aggressively. For high-performers, the path for advancement moves at the speed of your ambition.
 

Duration: 6 Months (Full-time paid internship)

Eligibility: Recent graduates or students in their final year of study.
About the Program:

This intensive 6-month internship is a fast track into a career as a Customer Success Engineer. You will work side-by-side with our experienced CSE team, gaining hands-on experience with the SAFE product, engaging with customers, and solving complex technical challenges.
The program is designed to develop the foundational skills required for a Customer Success Engineer (Level 1). Upon successful completion of the internship and demonstration of the core competencies, you will be eligible for a full-time offer as a Customer Success Engineer (CSE I).
Core Responsibilities:
As a CSE Intern, your primary focus will be supporting the team and mastering the core competencies necessary for the full-time role.
Product and Technical Acumen:
  • Product Troubleshooting: Support senior CSEs in diagnosing, analyzing, and resolving technical issues within the SAFE platform.
  • Documentation Knowledge: Assist in creating and updating technical documentation, runbooks, and knowledge base articles to enhance team and customer efficiency.
  • Scripting Automation: Learn and apply basic scripting and querying skills (e.g., Python, SQL, OPAL) to assist with data analysis, reporting, and developing minor automation tools.
Customer Engagement and Communication:
  • Customer Consultancy: Shadow and eventually assist the team in guiding customers through product setup, integration best practices, and advising on feature usage based on their specific needs.
  • Stakeholder Communication: Practice and refine effective communication with both internal teams (e.g., Product, Engineering) and external customers, ensuring clear and professional correspondence.
  • Customer Relationship Management: Support the cultivation of strong, positive customer relationships by actively listening and ensuring all interactions are aligned with the Customer First value.
Process and Growth:
  • Process Execution: Learn and adhere to established processes for incident management, request handling, and change execution.
  • AI Proficiency: Actively leverage AI tools and functionality (e.g., for prompt building, summarizing data, drafting responses) to increase personal efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Autonomy and Accountability: Take ownership of assigned tasks and learning goals, demonstrating a proactive approach to problem-solving and seeking guidance when needed.
What We Look For (The "Intern Fit"):
We are seeking freshers with a strong foundation and high growth potential.
  • Education: Recent graduate or currently in the final year of a Bachelor s or Master s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field.
  • Technical Foundation: Demonstrated foundational knowledge or coursework in scripting/coding languages (e.g., Python, SQL).
  • Problem-Solving: Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with a curious and detail-oriented mindset.
  • Communication: Clear, concise, and professional communication skills, demonstrating the ability to be Always Candid with positive intent.
  • Mindset: A high degree of Technological Adaptability and a proactive willingness to learn new tools and systems quickly.
  • Values: Alignment with our core values, especially Customer First, and a commitment to Autonomy and Accountability in your work.

title: SQL Developer Fresher Interns
jobDescription:
SQL Developer Fresher Interns

The SQL MySQL Developer plays a crucial role in the design, development, and maintenance of databases, as well as the implementation and optimization of SQL queries. This role is essential in ensuring the efficient management and utilization of data within an organization by leveraging the capabilities of MySQL databases.
This is a Remote Position.
Key responsibilities
  • Design, develop, and maintain complex SQL queries and stored procedures.

  • Optimize and improve existing SQL queries for performance and scalability.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams to understand database requirements and implement efficient database solutions.
  • Monitor and ensure the integrity and security of databases, including backup and recovery processes.
  • Perform data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and insights to support business decision-making.
  • Collaborate with software developers to integrate database functionality into applications.
  • Conduct performance tuning and optimization of databases for maximum efficiency.
  • Create and maintain documentation of database processes and procedures.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve database-related issues and errors in a timely manner.
  • Implement and maintain database security measures to protect sensitive data.
Required qualifications
  • Apprentice or Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • Understanding of relational database management systems and SQL principles.
  • Knowledge of MySQL database administration and development.
  • Proficiency in writing and optimizing SQL queries and stored procedures.
  • Experience working with database design, normalization, and performance tuning.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills for data analysis and troubleshooting.
  • Understanding of data security and compliance standards.
  • Knowledge of software development lifecycle and version control systems.
  • Ability to adapt to new technologies and learn continuously in a fast-paced environment.
  • Understanding of indexing, query execution plans, and database optimization techniques.
  • Experience with data modeling tools and techniques.
  • Knowledge of ETL processes and tools.
  • Familiarity with NoSQL databases is a plus.
  • Certifications in MySQL or relevant database technologies are advantageous.

title: Business Intelligence Intern
jobDescription:
Looking for a motivated and analytical Business Intelligence Intern to join our team. As a Business Intelligence Intern, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in collecting, analyzing, and visualizing data to provide valuable insights to support business decision-making. You will work closely with our BI team to assist in various projects aimed at improving data-driven processes and enhancing organizational efficiency. What's For The Candidate:

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to work effectively in a team environment
  • Detail-oriented with a commitment to accuracy and quality in data analysis and reporting
  • Proactive and self-motivated with a willingness to learn and adapt to new challenges
  • Prior internship or coursework related to Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, or Data Science is preferred but not required.

title: Sales Intern
jobDescription:
About jhana
jhana is an early-stage, seed-funded startup that builds intelligent practice tools for the law across research, drafting, and document management. At jhana.ai, we are transforming the legal industry with India s first AI-driven Paralegal. Our product delivers critical legal insights through advanced AI, producing outputs like redlines, memos, and risk assessments to streamline workflows for legal teams. Recognized as the Best Legal Tech Startup in Asia and Oceania by ALITA, we are on a mission to empower professionals with technology that drives efficiency and excellence.
Position Overview
We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Sales Intern with a strong educational background in law, business, or analytics. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about sales, enjoys working with data, and has hands-on experience with Google Sheets, Excel, and data analytics. As a Sales Intern, you will support our sales team with various tasks, analyze data for actionable insights, and assist in client interactions. This is a fantastic opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a dynamic environment, with the chance to make an impact in legal tech and sales. This position involves regular client interaction, both virtually and in-person, and requires travel.
The day-to-day
  • Sales Support & Coordination: Assist the sales team with lead generation, client outreach, and follow-up activities. Help coordinate and organize sales materials for meetings, presentations, and proposals. Maintain and update CRM records, ensuring that client information and sales activities are accurately documented.
  • Data Analysis & Reporting: Use Google Sheets and Excel to analyze sales data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights. Develop and maintain sales dashboards, reports, and visualizations to track performance metrics. Assist in creating weekly and monthly reports to support data-driven decision-making.
  • Market Research & Lead Generation: Conduct market research to identify potential new clients and opportunities. Prepare targeted lists of prospects based on industry, region, and other criteria. Research industry trends, competitors, and client needs to better understand the sales landscape.
  • Process Improvement & Sales Operations: Support the sales team in improving workflows and processes to enhance productivity. Help document sales processes, create templates, and suggest new tools or techniques to streamline operations. Collaborate with team members to identify areas where data analytics can optimize our approach to client engagement and sales.
  • Client Interaction & Communication: Assist in client communications, including responding to inquiries, scheduling follow-up meetings, and maintaining professional relationships. Participate in client meetings and presentations as needed, gaining experience in client-facing sales activities. Support account management by helping to address client questions and maintain satisfaction.
Qualifications & Skills
  • Education: Bachelor s degree or current enrollment in a program related to Law, Business, Data Analytics, or a related field. A background in law is strongly preferred.
  • Analytical Skills: Strong proficiency with Google Sheets, Excel, and a keen interest in data analytics. Experience with data visualization tools is a plus.
  • Communication Skills: Clear and professional communication skills, both written and verbal.
  • Organizational Skills: Detail-oriented and highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously.
  • Tech-savvy: Comfortable using CRM software, project management tools, and other sales-related applications.
  • Self-Motivated: A proactive learner who takes initiative and demonstrates a keen interest in sales and business development.
Preferred Skills
  • Hands-on experience in data analysis, reporting, and creating dashboards in Google Sheets or Excel.
  • Prior internship or coursework in sales, marketing, analytics, or a related field.
  • Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) is a plus.
Additional Requirements
  • Availability: Ability to commit to the internship schedule, with flexibility for occasional team meetings and client calls.
  • Team Player: A collaborative spirit, willing to work closely with team members and contribute positively to a fast-paced environment.
Miscellany
This role will start ASAP and requires in-person presence at our Bangalore HQ / New Delhi RO.
This role provides valuable exposure to sales processes, data analytics, and client relationship management within the legal tech space. You will work with seasoned professionals, develop critical analytical skills, and gain insight into the rapidly evolving B2B sales landscape.
Come as you are: we are a diverse team constituted by members of different backgrounds in nationality, religion, caste, gender, and sexual orientation. We sincerely and wholeheartedly welcome diverse individuals.
Apply using this form *Complete our abbreviated application (10 min). Promising candidates will be invited to an interview. All candidates will receive a reply by email, please do not email us separately.

title: Recruitment Intern
jobDescription:
As a Recruitment Intern, you will play a vital role in supporting our HR and recruitment team in identifying and attracting top talent to our organization. This internship will provide you with hands-on experience in the field of recruitment, offering exposure to various aspects of the hiring process.
*Key Responsibilities:*
1. *Candidate Sourcing:* Assist in sourcing candidates through various channels, such as job boards, social media, and professional networks.
2. *Resume Screening:* Review resumes and applications to identify qualified candidates, ensuring they meet the required qualifications and skills.
3. *Interview Coordination:* Schedule and coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers, ensuring a smooth interview process.
4. *Candidate Communication:* Communicate with candidates via email or phone, providing information about the interview process, status updates, and feedback.
5. *Application Tracking:* Maintain and update applicant tracking systems (ATS) to ensure accurate and organized candidate records.
6. *Reference Checks:* Assist in conducting reference checks for potential hires.
7. *Job Posting:* Create and post job listings on various job boards and our company website.
8. *Data Analysis:* Compile recruitment metrics and reports, helping to identify areas for improvement in the recruitment process.
9. *Employer Branding:* Contribute to employer branding initiatives, such as creating content for social media and career pages to attract potential candidates.
*Qualifications:*
- Currently enrolled in a relevant degree program (Human Resources, Business Administration, etc.) or recent graduate.
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
- Detail-oriented and organized with excellent time management skills.
- Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information.
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
- Enthusiasm for learning and a strong interest in recruitment and HR.
*Benefits:*
- Practical experience in the recruitment and human resources field.
- Exposure to various aspects of the hiring process.
- Mentorship and guidance from experienced HR professionals.
- Networking opportunities within the HR and recruitment industry.
- Potential for future employment opportunities based on performance.

For More details
RF Design Interns: One Position. Job Summary: We aim to enhance our RF design capabilities by incorporating fresh perspectives and the latest academic insights. The interns will assist in designing and simulating High-Speed RF and microwave circuits using Keysight ADS. Their role will also include hands-on testing and validation. Key Responsibilities:
Assist in the design, simulation, and analysis of High-Speed RF and microwave circuits. Creating and optimizing PCB layouts for RF components and systems. Conducting simulations to predict the behavior of RF circuits. Implement tuning and matching techniques to improve circuit performance. Identify and resolve issues in RF circuits and systems. Collaborate with senior engineers to refine designs based on simulation results. Prepare technical reports and design reviews. Explore new tools, techniques, and methodologies to improve design and simulation processes.
Requirements: Strong understanding of RF principles and components. Ability to perform simulations to predict and optimize RF circuit performance. Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities. Strong attention to detail. Ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a team. Proactive and self-motivated with a continuously improving mindset.
CMOS Circuit Design Strong understanding of MOSFET operation, CMOS logic, low-power design, and VLSI layout techniques. PDK EDA Tools Experience with Process Design Kits (PDKs) and semiconductor fabrication processes. Knowledge on Keysight ADS is must. FPGA Development Proficiency in Verilog/VHDL, FPGA architecture, high-speed digital design, and debugging tools. Python Scripting Automation for circuit simulations, test bench development, data analysis, and hardware interfacing.
Qualification / Ideal Candidate: Pursuing a Master s degree in Electrical Engineering, RF/Microwave Engineering, or a related field. Proficient with simulation tools like Keysight ADS. Strong understanding of RF principles and a passion for high-frequency design.

About Damooga Foundation
Damooga Foundation, a leading IT-enabled NGO founded in 2014, pioneers environmental and sustainable technologies. Driven by a passionate team, we believe in actionable change, rejecting idleness and complaints. Our mission is clear: leave the world better than we found it.
Collaborating with diverse partners, we harness technology to shape a sustainable future. Join us in the movement where IT meets environmental advocacy, and action defines impact.
Job description
Program Coordinator: Managing and oversee programs or initiatives within the NGO, ensuring they run smoothly and achieve their goals.
Job Title: Program Coordinator
Job Description:
As a Program Coordinator, you will play a pivotal role in the planning, execution, and oversight of various programs and initiatives within our NGO. Your responsibilities will encompass program development, management, and evaluation to ensure successful outcomes and impact.
Key Responsibilities:
Program Development:
  • Collaborate with team members to identify program needs, objectives, and goals.
  • Develop program plans, including timelines, budgets, and resource requirements.
  • Research and stay updated on industry trends and best practices to inform program design.
Program Management:
  • Oversee the day-to-day operations of assigned programs, ensuring adherence to timelines and budgets.
  • Coordinate program activities, including scheduling meetings, workshops, and events.
  • Monitor and manage program budgets, expenses, and resource allocation.
  • Maintain records and documentation related to program activities and outcomes.
Stakeholder Engagement:
  • Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders, including volunteers, partners, and community members.
  • Establish and maintain effective communication channels to keep stakeholders informed about program progress.
Monitoring and Evaluation:
  • Develop and implement program evaluation frameworks to assess program effectiveness.
  • Collect and analyze data to measure program impact and identify areas for improvement.
  • Prepare reports and presentations summarizing program achievements and outcomes.
Resource Mobilization:
  • Assist in grant writing and fundraising efforts to secure funding for programs.
  • Identify potential funding opportunities and partnerships to support program sustainability.
Team Coordination:
  • Coordinate and collaborate with team members, delegating tasks as needed.
  • Provide guidance and support to program staff, volunteers, and interns.
Compliance and Reporting:
  • Ensure program activities comply with relevant laws, regulations, and organizational policies.
  • Prepare and submit regular reports to management and funders as required.
Qualifications:
  • Bachelors degree in a relevant field (Social Work, Nonprofit Management, etc.); a Masters degree may be preferred for certain roles.
  • Proven experience in program coordination or management within the nonprofit sector.
  • Strong organizational and project management skills.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.
  • Proficiency in data analysis and reporting.
  • Ability to work collaboratively and effectively with diverse stakeholders.
  • Commitment to the mission and values of the NGO

The Role

title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Intern
jobDescription:
Gain hands-on experience in optimizing web content, conducting keyword research, and analyzing performance metrics. Perfect for recent graduates or students eager to learn SEO strategies in a dynamic environment. Apply now and enhance your skills in search engine optimization
 
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Internship Profile
 
We are offering an exciting 3-month Search Engine Optimization (SEO) internship at our Chembur, Mumbai office. This internship provides a fantastic opportunity for analytical and detail-oriented students to gain hands-on experience in optimizing websites for search engines. You will learn to research keywords, optimize website content, build backlinks, and analyze website traffic and performance. As an intern, you will be an integral part of our SEO team, working closely with experienced SEO specialists and gaining valuable insights into organic search.
 
Responsibilities
 
SEO Tasks
  • Keyword Research and Analysis: We conduct in-depth keyword research to identify relevant keywords and search terms that align with our clients business objectives and target audience. We also analyze keyword competition and search volume to inform SEO strategies.
  • On-page Optimization: Optimize website content for search engines by incorporating relevant keywords, writing compelling meta descriptions, optimizing headings, and ensuring proper website structure and navigation.
  • Off-page Optimization: Build high-quality backlinks to websites through various link-building strategies, such as guest blogging, directory submissions, and content promotion.
  • Website analysis: analyze website traffic and performance using SEO tools like Google Analytics and Google Search Console. Identify areas for improvement and track key metrics like organic traffic, bounce rate, and conversion rates.
  • Rank Tracking: Track keyword rankings and organic search visibility to monitor the effectiveness of SEO efforts and identify areas for optimization.
  • SEO Strategy: assist in developing and implementing SEO strategies for clients, including on-page optimization, off-page optimization, and technical SEO.
  • Reporting and Presentations: Create reports and presentations on SEO performance, providing insights and recommendations to clients and internal stakeholders.
Learning and Development
  • SEO Principles: Learn the core principles of search engine optimization, including on-page optimization, off-page optimization, technical SEO, content optimization, and link building.
  • SEO Tools and Platforms: Gain hands-on experience with essential SEO tools and platforms, such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, keyword research tools (e.g., SEMrush, Ahrefs), and rank tracking tools.
  • Skill Development: Develop valuable skills in keyword research, on-page optimization, off-page optimization, technical SEO, website analysis, data interpretation, and reporting.
Requirements for Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Internship
  • Education: Currently pursuing a bachelor s or master s degree in marketing, business administration, communications, or a related field.

Skills:

  • Strong interest in digital marketing and search engine optimization (SEO).
  • Basic understanding of search engine optimization concepts and principles.
  • Excellent analytical and research skills.
  • Strong written communication skills for creating compelling and informative content.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets for data analysis and reporting.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Strong work ethic and a willingness to learn.
Desired Candidate Profile
  • Analytical Mindset: A strong interest in analyzing data, understanding website performance, and using insights to improve SEO strategies.
  • Eager to Learn: Highly motivated and eager to learn about SEO and contribute to the team s success.
  • Detail-Oriented: meticulous attention to detail when optimizing website content, conducting keyword research, and analyzing data.
  • Strong work ethic: dedicated, responsible, and committed to completing tasks effectively and efficiently.
  • Good communication skills: communicating clearly and professionally verbally and in writing.
  • Team player: collaborative and supportive, working well with others in a team environment.
Benefits
  • Practical Experience: Gain practical experience in various aspects of SEO, working on real-world projects for clients.
  • Skill Development: Develop valuable skills in keyword research, on-page optimization, off-page optimization, technical SEO, website analysis, and reporting.
  • Industry Knowledge: Learn about the latest trends and best practices in search engine optimization.
  • Networking Opportunities: Network with industry professionals and gain insights into the SEO landscape.
  • Potential for Future Employment: Strong performance during the internship may lead to future employment opportunities at Hiya Digital .
  • Letter of Recommendation: Receive a recommendation letter upon completing the internship.

title: Search Engine Marketing (SEM) Intern
jobDescription:
Gain hands-on Search Engine Marketing (SEM) internship experience with Hiya Digitals internship in Chembur, Mumbai! Learn Google Ads, keyword research, campaign optimization, & more. 3-month paid internship.
 
Profile
 
We offer an exciting 3-month Search Engine Marketing (SEM) internship at our Chembur, Mumbai office. This internship provides a fantastic opportunity for data-driven and results-oriented students to gain hands-on experience planning, executing, and optimizing SEM campaigns. You will learn to conduct keyword research, write compelling ad copy, manage campaign budgets, and track performance metrics. As an intern, you will be an integral part of our SEM team, working closely with experienced professionals and gaining valuable insights into paid search advertising.
 
Responsibilities
 
SEM Tasks
  • Campaign Planning and Execution: Assist in planning and executing SEM campaigns across various platforms, primarily Google Ads, with potential exposure to other platforms like Bing Ads.
  • Keyword Research and Analysis: Conduct in-depth keyword research and analysis to identify relevant keywords and search terms that align with our client s business objectives.
  • Ad Copywriting: Write clear, concise, and compelling ad copy that attracts clicks and drives conversions, adhering to best practices and platform guidelines.
  • Campaign Management: Help manage campaign budgets, bids, and targeting options to optimize campaign performance and maximize ROI.
  • Performance Tracking: Track and analyze campaign performance using platform reporting tools and dashboards, monitoring key metrics such as impressions, clicks, conversions, and cost-per-click (CPC).
  • A/B Testing: Participate in A/B testing of ad creatives, landing pages, and other campaign elements to identify strategies that improve performance.
  • Reporting and Insights: Generate reports on campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations for optimization.
Learning and Development
  • SEM Principles: Learn the core principles of search engine marketing, including campaign structure, keyword targeting, ad auction dynamics, quality score, and conversion tracking.
  • SEM Platforms and Tools: Gain hands-on experience with SEM platforms like Google Ads and explore various SEM tools for keyword research, competitor analysis, and campaign management.
  • Skill Development: Develop valuable skills in keyword research, campaign planning and execution, ad copywriting, budget management, performance tracking, data analysis, and reporting.
Requirements for Search Engine Marketing (SEM) Internship
  • Education: Currently pursuing a bachelor s or master s degree in marketing, business administration, or a related field.

Skills:

  • Strong interest in digital marketing and search engine marketing (SEM).
  • Basic understanding of search engine marketing concepts and principles.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets for data analysis.
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Excellent communication skills (written and verbal).

  • Data-driven: A strong interest in analyzing and using data to make informed decisions to optimize campaign performance.
  • Eager to Learn: Highly motivated and eager to learn about SEM and contribute to the team s success.
  • Results-Oriented: Focused on achieving campaign goals and maximizing return on investment (ROI).
  • Strong work ethic: dedicated, responsible, and committed to completing tasks effectively and efficiently.
  • Good communication skills: communicating clearly and professionally, both verbally and in writing.
  • Team player: collaborative and supportive, working well with others in a team environment.
Benefits of Search Engine Marketing (SEM) Internship
  • Practical Experience: Gain practical experience planning, executing, and optimizing SEM campaigns for real clients.
  • Skill Development: Develop valuable skills in keyword research, ad copywriting, campaign management, performance tracking, and data analysis.
  • Industry Knowledge: Learn about the latest trends and best practices in search engine marketing.
  • Networking Opportunities: Network with industry professionals and gain insights into the SEM landscape.

title: Data Scientist (Internship & Full-Time)
jobDescription:
Job Description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Data Scientist with expertise in statistics, mathematics, and computer science to extract insights and develop predictive models. The role begins with a 6-month paid internship, leading to full-time employment with a 3-year bond (including the internship period)
Responsibilities:
  • Extract, clean, and analyze large datasets from various sources to uncover trends and insights.
  • Develop predictive models and machine learning algorithms to address complex business challenges.
  • Design and conduct experiments to test hypotheses and improve model accuracy.
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams to transform business requirements into data-driven solutions.
  • Interpret and present findings through reports, visualizations, and presentations for stakeholders.
  • Optimize and automate data processes for efficiency and scalability.
Requirements :
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Proficiency in Python, R, and SQL for data manipulation and model development.
  • Hands-on experience with machine learning techniques and frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and statistical skills.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills for conveying insights effectively.
Preferred Qualifications:
  • Experience working in cloud environments like AWS, Azure, OCI, or Google Cloud Platform.
  • Knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes for containerization.
  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies and DevOps practices.
  • Experience with distributed computing and parallel processing frameworks.
Selection Process:
  • HackerRank Test Candidates will be evaluated on their technical proficiency.
  • Interview Rounds Shortlisted candidates will go through multiple interview rounds.
  • Offer & Employment Selected candidates will begin with a 6-month paid internship, followed by full-time employment with a 3-year bond.
Resume Expectations:
Strong technical skills relevant to the role.
Completion of relevant certifications (if any).
Prior experience or proven capability in the required skill set.
Additional Information:
Work Timings: 1:00 PM 10:00 PM
Workdays: Monday to Friday (Weekends Off)
Internship Period: 6 months (Paid)
Employment Bond: 3 years (including the internship)
Drop Facility: Available

Ensure these materials are up to date and readily accessible to the sales team.Sales Pipeline Management: Help manage the sales pipeline by tracking and updating leads, opportunities, and sales activities in CRM (Customer Relationship Management) systems. Provide regular updates to the sales team regarding the status of leads and opportunities.Sales Team Coordination: Collaborate with the sales team to coordinate meetings, sales events, and presentations. Assist in the preparation of sales proposals, contracts, and sales presentations.Sales Reporting and Forecasting: Prepare and maintain sales reports, performance dashboards, and sales forecasting documents. Provide accurate and timely sales data and analysis to support decision-making and planning.Product Knowledge: Develop a solid understanding of the company's products or services, features, benefits, and competitive advantages. title: IT Recruiter
jobDescription:
We areseeking a skilled and proactive IT Recruiter to join our HR team anddrive full-cycle recruitment efforts for a wide range of IT and technical salesroles. The ideal candidate will have a solid understanding of modern IT domainsincluding AWS Cloud Services, DevOps, Data Science & AI/ML, SoftwareDevelopment, Cybersecurity , and Technical Sales & Marketing roles.

You willwork closely with hiring managers and technical teams to attract, screen, andhire top-tier talent aligned with the organizations strategic goals.

KeyResponsibilities:

  • Manage end-to-end recruitment lifecycle including sourcing, screening, online assessment, interviewing, and onboarding.
  • Develop and implement effective sourcing strategies to attract active and passive candidates across platforms like LinkedIn, Naukri, Hirect, and consultancy etc
  • Partner with hiring managers to understand role requirements and workforce planning.
  • Screen and assess candidates for both technical and cultural fit.

Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified professionals in:

  • Cloud (AWS) & DevOps roles
  • Data Engineering, AI/ML, and Analytics
  • Software Development (Full-stack, Backend, Frontend,)
  • Cybersecurity Engineers & Analysts
  • Solution Architects & Technical Consultants
  • Sales Roles (BDE, BDM, ISR, Pre-sales, Inside Sales, etc)
  • Marketing & Digital Strategy Professionals
  • Coordinate and schedule interviews between candidates and internal stakeholders.
  • Maintain recruitment data and analytics for reporting and continuous improvement.
  • Support employer branding and campus hiring activities where needed.

Requirements

  • Bachelors degree in Human Resources, MBA, or related field.
  • Proven experience (0 to 2 years) in IT/Technical Recruitment , preferably in cloud, DevOps, or product-based environments.
  • Familiarity with technologies across Cloud (AWS preferred), DevOps Tools, Programming Languages, AI/ML frameworks, and Cybersecurity trends.
  • Experience recruiting for IT Sales and Marketing Roles is a plus.
  • Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple open roles simultaneously with a sense of urgency.

Preferred Skills:

  • AWS Cloud or other technical certification (not mandatory, but an advantage).
  • Knowledge of technical job functions and understanding of software development lifecycle.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication in English and Hindi.
  • Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

Why Join Us

  • Be part of a vibrant and forward-thinking company that values innovation and excellence.
  • Work with a team of dedicated professionals passionate about cloud technologies.
  • Enjoy a competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.
  • Benefit from a supportive culture with opportunities for professional growth and development.

title: Human Resource Intern
jobDescription:
About the Role

We are looking for an enthusiastic HR Intern IT Recruitment to support our talent acquisition team. The intern will gain hands-on experience in end-to-end IT hiring, sourcing technical talent, and working closely with recruiters and hiring managers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in end-to-end IT recruitment for junior, mid-level, and senior technical roles
  • Source candidates from job portals (Naukri, Indeed), LinkedIn, GitHub, referrals, etc.
  • Screen resumes based on technical skills and role requirements
  • Conduct initial HR screening calls and assess candidate fit
  • Coordinate technical and HR interviews with candidates and panel members
  • Maintain and update candidate trackers and ATS
  • Follow up with candidates on interview feedback and status
  • Support in offer rollouts, documentation, and onboarding activities
  • Build and maintain a strong candidate pipeline for IT roles
  • Learn market trends, salary benchmarks, and hiring practices in IT recruitment

IT Roles You May Recruit For

  • Software Developers (Java, Python, .NET, Full Stack)
  • Frontend / Backend Developers
  • QA / Automation Engineers
  • DevOps / Cloud Engineers
  • Data Analysts / Data Scientists
  • UI/UX Designers
  • Product & Support Roles

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • MBA / MSW / PGDM / Bachelor’s degree (HR or related field) – Pursuing or Completed
  • Strong interest in IT Recruitment / Talent Acquisition
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Basic understanding of IT technologies and roles (training will be provided)
  • Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment
  • Positive attitude and willingness to learn

Good to Have

  • Basic knowledge of recruitment lifecycle
  • Prior internship or coursework in HR / Recruitment
  • Exposure to LinkedIn sourcing or job portals

What You Will Learn

  • End-to-end IT recruitment process
  • Sourcing and screening technical candidates
  • Interview coordination and stakeholder management
  • HR operations and real-time hiring exposure
  • Corporate HR working environment

Benefits

  • Practical exposure to IT recruitment
  • Mentorship from experienced recruiters
  • Internship Certificate & Letter of Recommendation (based on performance)
  • Opportunity for full-time HR Recruiter role based on performance
